subtopics.title: Revision for BECE English
common_misconceptions: BECE English is easy and doesn't need preparation
You only need to study JSS3 work
subtopics.teaching_note: BECE English format: Paper 1 (Obj - comprehension, summary test, lexis/structure), Paper 2 (Essay - letter, composition, comprehension). Focus areas: Comprehension (read carefully, answer in complete sentences), Summary (identify main points, paraphrase, count words), Essay (plan, introduction-body-conclusion, use paragraphs), Letter (correct format), Grammar (tenses, parts of speech, reported speech). Practice with past BECE questions. Time management crucial.
